title: senecio polygaloides
intro: Senecio polygaloides, also known as Butterweed or Resurrection Plant, is a type of flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include the presence of pyrrolizidine alkaloids, such as senecionine and seneciphylline, that have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio polygaloides include its use as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic agent, which can help to relieve symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Senecio polygaloides are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although caution should be exercised due to the potential toxicity of the pyrrolizidine alkaloids.
